name: knowledge-transfer
description: AI-powered project handover for Claude Code and Codex: export onboarding docs plus privacy-filtered project memories into handover.zip, then dry-run, verify, and import accepted memories with receipts.

interface.shortDescription: Project handover with dry-run verified AI memories
interface.longDescription: Export a short onboarding document plus privacy-filtered project memories into handover.zip with safe omission accounting. Import dry-runs candidate memories, verifies each claim against current code, then writes accepted memories with per-memory receipts.
defaultPrompt: Use $knowledge-transfer to export a handover package.
Use $knowledge-transfer to dry-run and import verified project memories.
